sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const mockPhotos = { food: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1498837167922-ddd27525d352?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', appliance: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1484154218962-a197022b5858?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', campus: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1523050854058-8df90110c9f1?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', }; function Home({ currentUser }) { return (
CampusCycle

Campus reuse, made simple.

A more focused way to circulate appliances, food, and dorm essentials before they become waste.

Explore Listings {currentUser ? ( View Profile ) : ( Create Account )}
CampusCycle Greater Boston
Featured listing Mini fridge

Reserved locally instead of discarded at move-out.

School Harvard
Category Appliances
Mission Lower waste. Better handoffs. More visible reuse.
Why it matters

Useful items should stay in circulation longer.

CampusCycle helps students make faster, more local handoffs while reducing avoidable food and appliance waste.

Food Waste

Keep usable food in reach.

Pantry items and meal basics can move quickly to nearby students instead of being thrown away at the end of term.

Appliance Reuse

Extend the life of what already works.

Mini fridges, lamps, and microwaves remain valuable long after one semester ends. A better handoff keeps them in use.

Educational dashboard

Make environmental impact easier to understand.

Clear signals help students see that each listing can reduce unnecessary purchasing, disposal, and replacement.

Mock weekly diversion Items redirected from waste
Food
72%
Appliances
61%
Storage
84%
Mock semester trend Participation improves when reuse is visible

Mock data: when reuse activity is easy to see, educational messaging becomes more actionable.

A calmer experience

Designed to feel clean, modern, and dependable across every screen size.

CampusCycle combines a premium interface with a practical mission: lower waste, better visibility, and simpler student reuse.

Regional pickup

Made for campus neighborhoods.

School, region, and area filters make local exchanges feel faster and more realistic.

Professional by design

Structured like a product, not a bulletin board.

Clear hierarchy, restrained motion, and cleaner spacing help the platform feel more trusted from the first screen.

Reuse First Guide student choices toward circulation.
Local Context Keep listings relevant to nearby pickup.
Clear Trust Signals Make each handoff feel more reliable.
Start locally

Built for campus communities that want lower waste and better handoffs.

Browse listings View mock checkout
); } export default Home;
